decision.summary: Resume from existing checkpoint with memory-safe batch-2 profile and safe colony regularization tweaks.

result.notes: No OOM observed during sampled interval. Training advanced continuously with checkpoint writes and stable VRAM.

decision.summary: Test conservative numeric changes to reduce high-loss spikes while keeping batch=2 stable.

result.notes: Completed 60-minute snapshot: relaunch produced a high-volatility spike (max 17.74), then settled lower. Means improved from first_60=8.40 to last_60=6.51, and tail_200=5.79 confirms gradual downtrend. Run stayed stable (no OOM/panic), with ~2.1 GB VRAM headroom on a 6 GB card.

decision.summary: Next round from scratch at 1M steps with batch=2, using available VRAM headroom while undoing over-constraining exploration/edit limits from the prior run.

result.notes: Superseded before full 60-minute completion. v1 showed an early valley but regressed later; replaced with v2 stability-focused config.

decision.summary: Launch a new 1M-step experiment as a true from-scratch run with no checkpoint resume path.

result.notes: Launched and validated at startup: scratch/no-resume confirmed. Early trend improved, then regressed: valley at steps 3010-4000 (mean loss 5.4529) vs recent steps 5010-6060 (mean 7.3576). Tail_100 rose to 7.3049, so run was replaced by v2 stability profile.

decision.summary: Launch fresh m1m-v2 run with lower exploration pressure and slower forgetting to address v1 late-stage regression.

result.notes: v2 stayed stable without crashes, but recent loss flattened higher than target (tail_100=6.11, tail_200=5.97) and death spikes remained periodic. Replaced by v3 ants+warmstart test with compact checkpoint IO logging in pod logs.

decision.summary: Increase ants for broader search while reducing synchronized death churn via higher streak threshold + warmstart gating; add compact checkpoint IO samples in server logs.

result.notes: Current v3 run looks great at this stage: strong early descent (first_25_mean=8.9705 -> last_100_mean=4.6179), min loss reached 2.7906, no restarts/OOM observed, and VRAM usage remains stable with headroom (3967/6144 MB).

decision.summary: Keep v3 hyperparameters unchanged and frontload high-quality plain English for 100k steps, then resume 900k on existing books corpus in the same experiment.

result.notes: Theory: frontloading high-quality plain English should improve spacing/legibility priors before heavy docs/code mix, while preserving the currently strong v3 numeric profile by keeping all hyperparameters unchanged. Operational note: startup latency is higher than expected in current deploy path; measured from host start to phase banner is ~39.85s (02:59:31Z -> 03:00:10Z) and to "Starting diffusion training" is ~40.15s.

decision.summary: Move to three-phase sharded curriculum (english -> sentence bridge -> books) with unchanged v3/v4 numeric hyperparameters for startup reliability and continuous data progression.

result.notes: Qualitative stage note: currently in the early "the-stage" collapse (high-frequency token loops). Observed sample: "pred : the the, the the the the of the, the the of the, of the of of, the,, the of the. the,.,, the the, the the, the the the., the, the the the. the the the the the to the, the,. the the".

decision.summary: Fix diffusion credit assignment to use clean supervised targets and isolate per-batch proposals (B>1), plus make mask decoding explicit to remove misleading '?' gaps in sample text.

changes.from: unsupervised/logit delta on edited token from corrupted base
changes.to: supervised CE improvement against clean target token

changes.from: all proposals mixed across batch elements
changes.to: per-batch proposal slices and per-batch trace construction

changes.from: dynamic mask id rendered as '?' or dropped

result.notes: This fix addresses two high-impact correctness issues in B=2 runs: cross-batch contamination in ant/pheromone credit and target mismatch during credit scoring. Treat pre-fix v5 metrics as non-comparable to post-fix runs for pheromone/credit dynamics.

decision.summary: Preserve trailing whitespace in prefix-marker BPE encoding so line-by-line streaming tokenization does not merge adjacent lines into malformed words.

changes.from: dropped when chunk ended on whitespace
changes.to: encoded as standalone whitespace marker tokens when available
added line-boundary and trailing-space streaming tests

result.notes: Expected effect: cleaner IO samples with proper inter-line spaces and fewer merged words (for example, no "chosen.Someone" artifacts caused by chunk boundary whitespace loss).

decision.summary: Redeploy with truthful sample rendering so server logs reflect denoising behavior at corrupted positions and preserve whitespace-token visibility.

changes.from: collapsed to empty string in compact log line

result.notes: Reason for redeploy: live v6 showed low masked-position accuracy (~1-2% top1 at step ~2k-3k) and logs needed truthful denoising-only predictions for diagnosis.

decision.summary: Prepare reasoning corpus from nohurry/Opus-4.6-Reasoning-3000x-filtered using only question/problem and answer/solution, explicitly excluding thinking traces.

result.notes: Prepared scripts: prepare-reasoning-corpus.py and run-reasoning-resume.sh. Next phase will resume after 1M baseline completes.

decision.summary: Add perpetual infer-live CLI for qualitative monitoring without disturbing active training, using checkpoint snapshots and CPU backend.

changes.to: infinite 1Hz diffusion loop with feedback tokens

result.notes: Smoke test on v7 checkpoint snapshot produced iterative outputs (live iter 1..6) at ~1s interval in CPU mode while training job remained running.

decision.summary: Add and prepare lsb/million-english-numbers as three sharded training variants for post-reasoning curriculum: word-copy, int-to-word, and word-to-int.

evaluation.stop_reason: dataset prep and integrity checks completed

result.notes: Initial full run created an extra trailing empty shard; fixed shard rotation logic and rebuilt cleanly. Final output verified: 1,000,000 examples per variant, 50 shards per variant, boundary checks passed (0/19999/20000/999999), and pod path is visible at /workspace/rust-pcn/data/million-english-numbers-sharded.

decision.summary: Document a canonical save/backup/resume workflow for continuing current training on new data without losing checkpoint continuity.

changes.to: latest checkpoint + metrics.jsonl + bpe vocab snapshot

evaluation.stop_reason: runbook documented and streaming discovery test confirmed

result.notes: Auto-loading path confirmed in erm-train/src/streaming_dataset.rs (NEW_FILE_RESCAN_INTERVAL=8) and validated with cargo test -p erm-train test_discover_new_txt_paths.

decision.summary: Validate new graph-health metrics on a resumed checkpoint path with a new experiment id while preserving existing AIM integration conventions.

result.notes: Resume path and experiment-id wiring validated, but CPU smoke on the large live checkpoint was too slow for a practical fixed window.

decision.summary: Run a short CPU diffusion smoke test to verify new graph-health fields in metrics.jsonl and ensure AIM watcher tracked keys are present.

result.notes: metrics.jsonl contains all new graph-health fields and all AIM watcher tracked keys are present in emitted records.

decision.summary: Backup live checkpoint, rebuild erm.new from main, redeploy as a new resume canary experiment id, and retarget AIM sidecar to the new exp path.

evaluation.stop_reason: canary attempts r2-r5 failed before stable training window (python bootstrap issue, then libcuda load failure)

result.notes: Superseded by i06-r6 runtimeClass-based CUDA redeploy.

decision.summary: Relaunch resume canary with Burn CUDA known-good setup (`runtimeClassName: nvidia`) and retarget AIM sidecar to new experiment id.

evaluation.stop_reason: stopped intentionally for ticket-1 rollout after healthy resume window

result.notes: CUDA preflight passed, resume loaded from step 175250, metrics/AIM stayed healthy until checkpoint snapshot and controlled stop for next ticket.

decision.summary: Enable MMAS-style pheromone floor and elite-only deposits, then redeploy CUDA resume canary with explicit `phi_min` and `elite_k` in run config.

changes.from: phi clamp [0, phi_max], all ants deposit
changes.to: phi clamp [phi_min, phi_max], deposit restricted to top-k elite ants

evaluation.stop_reason: stopped intentionally for ticket-2 rollout after full-hour window

result.notes: Snapshot captured at /home/kadajett/.openclaw/workspace/erm-rust/data/checkpoint-snapshots/alice-run-b2-m1m-v7-sharded-3phase-r1-i01-r1-20260305T005745Z before rolling to ticket-2.

decision.summary: Add leader utility term to route aggregation score and run a new CUDA resume canary with utility weighting enabled.

evaluation.stop_reason: stopped intentionally for ticket-3 rollout after checkpoint snapshot

result.notes: Run resumed from step 190000 and was rolled at step 195030 for ticket-3 deployment. Loss drifted down modestly but leader-edge metrics remained at zero (utility path still effectively inactive in this window).

decision.summary: Add ACS-style local pheromone update and redeploy CUDA resume canary with `local_update_xi` enabled.

changes.to: local edge update phi <- (1-xi)*phi + xi*phi_init before deposit

evaluation.stop_reason: stopped intentionally for ticket-4 rollout after short canary window

result.notes: CUDA preflight passed and resume loaded from i02 checkpoint at step 195000. Compared to i02, this window stayed more diverse (entropy mean ~0.92, top-1 share mean ~0.59), but leader edges remained at zero and loss drifted up in the tail.

decision.summary: Add step-dependent pheromone schedules (linear mode) and redeploy CUDA resume canary with schedule multipliers enabled.

changes.to: per-step schedule hooks with fixed/linear mode over evaporation, route_lambda, and diversity penalty

evaluation.stop_reason: stopped intentionally for ticket-5 rollout after extended canary window

result.notes: Extended canary showed persistent exploration relative to i02 (entropy mean ~0.85, top-1 share mean ~0.62) with no collapse, but leader-edge activity remained zero and loss stayed noisy without a stable downward trend.

decision.summary: Add age-based eta schedule with half-life option and redeploy CUDA resume canary with `age_eta_schedule=half_life`.

changes.to: configurable edge_eta schedule: reciprocal or half-life decay

evaluation.stop_reason: stopped intentionally for leader-edge wiring fix rollout

result.notes: Run resumed from i04 step 206750 and stayed stable through step 211160. Diversity/edge concentration remained similar to late i04, and leader-edge metrics stayed pinned at zero; snapshot captured at /home/kadajett/.openclaw/workspace/erm-rust/data/checkpoint-snapshots/alice-run-b2-m1m-v7-sharded-3phase-r1-i05-r1-20260305T032350Z.

decision.summary: Fix diffusion training to insert true leader edges and update leader utility EMA each step, then redeploy CUDA resume canary.

changes.from: leader proposals inserted via add_edge() and utility never updated
changes.to: leader proposals inserted via propose_edges() and utility updated via update_leader_utility()
i05 settings retained (linear schedule + age_half_life), with leader-edge wiring fix in code

result.notes: Leader-edge wiring fix remained active through step 218270 (leader_edges_last=731, leader_edge_fraction_last=1.0, leader_survival_last=0.7547), but the job was evicted by kubelet for ephemeral-storage disk pressure before the 60-minute window finished.

decision.summary: Add confidence-based active-set refinement (freeze high-confidence corrupted positions with a minimum active floor) and redeploy as i08 CUDA resume canary.

changes.from: all corrupted positions editable during diffusion refinement
changes.to: active-set gate using max-softmax confidence with freeze threshold and min-active floor in training and inference loops
i07 settings plus active_set_mode=true, freeze_confidence_threshold=0.85, min_active_positions=16 and ephemeral-storage requests on job pod

result.notes: Completed i08 window through step 223450 before ticket-8 rollout. String-quality proxies improved versus i07 while loss remained noisy; last-100 loss mean settled to 5.509 with leader-edge activity sustained.

decision.summary: Parallelize dense pheromone update passes on CPU (evaporation + decay/age/clamp) with deterministic sequential deposit, and redeploy CUDA resume canary.

changes.from: dense pheromone passes sequential over all edges
changes.to: rayon-based parallel dense passes with config gate; deposit path remains sequential

result.notes: Completed short i09 canary audit window before ticket-9 rollout; loss stayed roughly flat while leader-edge activity remained strong. Snapshot saved at /home/kadajett/.openclaw/workspace/erm-rust/data/checkpoint-snapshots/alice-run-b2-m1m-v7-sharded-3phase-r1-i09-r1-20260305T050840Z.

i09 settings retained plus mask_token_policy=extra_sentinel in generated config

result.notes: Completed i10 bridge-data window before dataset pivot. Snapshot saved at /home/kadajett/.openclaw/workspace/erm-rust/data/checkpoint-snapshots/alice-run-b2-m1m-v7-sharded-3phase-r1-i10-r1-20260305T052852Z.
